image_prompt: A cheerful cartoon forest clearing in the morning, a proud white rabbit with long ears standing tall, boasting to forest animals, a small humble green turtle watching quietly nearby, Pixar 3D animation style, vibrant colors, soft lighting
video_prompt: The rabbit announces loudly to the forest animals: I am the fastest animal in this forest! Nobody can beat me! The turtle slowly walks up and says calmly: I want to race with you. The rabbit laughs. 5 seconds, Pixar 3D cartoon style

image_prompt: A sunny forest path with a START banner, cartoon animals gathered as spectators cheering, the rabbit in running pose looking confident, the turtle at the starting line looking determined, a wise old owl holding a flag ready to start the race, Pixar 3D animation style
video_prompt: The owl waves the starting flag. The rabbit dashes off incredibly fast leaving a dust cloud behind. The turtle takes slow steady steps forward. The crowd cheers. 5 seconds, Pixar 3D cartoon style

image_prompt: The rabbit far ahead on the forest path, looking back and seeing the turtle as a tiny dot far behind, the rabbit laughing and looking relaxed, a beautiful shady tree with flowers beside the path, Pixar 3D animation style, warm afternoon lighting
video_prompt: The rabbit looks back and sees the turtle is very far behind. He laughs and says: That turtle is so slow, I have plenty of time to take a nap! He walks to a shady tree and lies down comfortably. 5 seconds, Pixar 3D cartoon style

image_prompt: The rabbit sleeping peacefully under a big tree with a dreamy smile, butterflies landing on his nose, Zzz sleep symbols floating above, meanwhile in the background the turtle is slowly but steadily walking on the path, afternoon golden light, Pixar 3D animation style
video_prompt: Close-up of the rabbit snoring peacefully under the tree. Cut to the turtle walking slowly and steadily step by step along the path, never stopping, with determined eyes. Sweat drops on the turtle but he keeps going. 5 seconds, Pixar 3D cartoon style

image_prompt: The turtle passing by the sleeping rabbit under the tree, the turtle looking at the rabbit briefly then continuing forward with determination, the path stretching toward a hill with a FINISH banner visible in the distance, Pixar 3D animation style, late afternoon lighting
video_prompt: The turtle walks past the sleeping rabbit. He glances at the rabbit but doesn't stop. He keeps walking steadily toward the finish line visible on the hill ahead. His eyes are focused and determined. 5 seconds, Pixar 3D cartoon style

image_prompt: The rabbit suddenly waking up in panic, eyes wide open, the sun setting in the background, the rabbit looking around frantically and seeing the turtle far ahead near the finish line on the hill, Pixar 3D animation style, dramatic sunset lighting
video_prompt: The rabbit wakes up suddenly and realizes the sun is setting. He jumps up and looks ahead in shock — the turtle is almost at the finish line! The rabbit starts running as fast as he can in a panic. 5 seconds, Pixar 3D cartoon style

image_prompt: The finish line scene on the hilltop, the turtle crossing the FINISH banner with a big happy smile, forest animals cheering and celebrating, confetti falling, the rabbit arriving just a moment too late looking exhausted and shocked, Pixar 3D animation style, golden hour celebration lighting
video_prompt: The turtle crosses the finish line! All the forest animals cheer and celebrate. Confetti falls from the sky. The rabbit arrives just one second too late, panting and falling to his knees in disbelief. 5 seconds, Pixar 3D cartoon style

image_prompt: A warm sunset scene, the rabbit and turtle shaking hands as friends, all forest animals gathered around smiling, a golden trophy beside the turtle, a text overlay saying Slow and steady wins the race, Pixar 3D animation style, beautiful sunset glow, heartwarming scene
video_prompt: The rabbit walks to the turtle and shakes his hand respectfully. The rabbit says: You won fair and square. I learned my lesson. The turtle smiles and says: Slow and steady wins the race. All animals cheer together. 5 seconds, Pixar 3D cartoon style
